name: Saganaki- Ctc
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice 8 ounces of Feta cheese into 2-inch by 3/8-inch squares (about 8 slices).
2. Combine 1 beaten egg and 1 teaspoon finely chopped oregano in a shallow dish.
3. Dip each slice of feta into the egg mixture, then shake off excess flour and coat well with flour.
4. Quickly sauté 4 slices of cheese on medium heat in 2 tablespoons olive oil until golden brown.
5. Remove from heat and pat dry.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 with remaining slices.
7. Season with black pepper.
8. Arrange on a plate with thick tomato slices.
9. Serve with wedges of lemon.
